title: PDF to PowerPoint
metaDescription: Convert PDF to PowerPoint presentation. Each page becomes a high-quality slide.
description:
PDF to PowerPoint converts your PDF documents into editable PowerPoint presentations (PPTX). Each PDF page is transformed into a high-quality slide, preserving the visual layout perfectly.

This tool is ideal for converting reports, handouts, or any PDF content into presentation format. You can choose the image quality (DPI) to balance between file size and visual clarity.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select it from your device.

howToUse.title: Choose Quality Settings
howToUse.description: Select the image quality (DPI) for the slides. Higher DPI means better quality but larger file size.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to create your PowerPoint presentation and download the PPTX file.

useCases.title: Presentation Creation
useCases.description: Convert PDF reports or documents into presentation slides for meetings.

useCases.title: Training Materials
useCases.description: Transform PDF training documents into interactive PowerPoint presentations.

useCases.title: Content Repurposing
useCases.description: Convert existing PDF content into editable slide format for further customization.

faq.question: Will the slides be editable?
faq.answer: Each slide contains a high-quality image of the PDF page. You can add text, shapes, and annotations on top in PowerPoint.

faq.question: What DPI should I choose?
faq.answer: Use 150 DPI for presentations displayed on screens. Use 300 DPI for printing or when you need the highest quality.

faq.question: Can I convert multi-page PDFs?
faq.answer: Yes, each page of your PDF becomes a separate slide in the PowerPoint presentation.
